title: Explorer Config
description: Shared domain and event registry for the safety-net-blueprint explorer package. Consumed by context-map and service-blueprints tools.

cross_cutting.description: Cross-cutting concerns shown as a banner on the context-map overview.

id.description: Unique identifier. Used as the filename slug and navigation ID. Must be snake_case.

label.description: Display name shown in the diagram.

status.description: Design completion status. Domains with 'not-started' are shown in the overview but are not clickable and do not generate a detail page.

description.description: One-line description of the domain's responsibility.

entities.description: Key entities owned by this domain, shown as a subtitle in the diagram.

events.description: Domain events (asynchronous, pub/sub). Status reflects whether the publisher is emitting the event, not whether individual subscribers have implemented their handlers.

name.description: Event name, conventionally in dot notation (e.g. application.submitted).

publisher.description: Domain ID that emits the event. Must match a domain id in the domains list.

status.description: Implementation status. Applies to all listed subscribers.

subscribers.description: One or more domain IDs that consume the event. Each must match a domain id in the domains list.

apis.description: Direct synchronous API calls (point-to-point, not event-driven). Each entry represents one operation and the domains that invoke it.

call.description: Human-readable name of the operation being invoked.

domain.description: Domain ID that exposes this operation. Must match a domain id in the domains list.

callers.description: One or more domain IDs that invoke this operation. Each must match a domain id in the domains list.
